upcomingEvents.title: Spring Choral Festival
upcomingEvents.description: A celebration of choral music featuring Hannah's original compositions performed by the Denver Feminist Chorus.

featuredVideo.title: Denver Feminist Chorus — 'A Book' by Hannah Kimball
featuredVideo.description: Watch the Denver Feminist Chorus perform Hannah's original composition 'A Book' at their recent concert Pride & Unpredjudice.
